abstract: The quantity of the product the customer purchased in a single transaction.
overview:
## Discussion

The `quantity` field applies only to purchases. Don’t include a `quantity` for refunds.

Set `quantity` to `1` when a customer purchases a single product. Use a value greater than `1` when someone purchases a multiple of the same product in one transaction.

Multiple items may be considered a single product if they are sold as a package. For example, a 10-pack of game gems may be a single product with a quantity of `1`.

If the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/productType] is `SUBSCRIPTION`, use a `quantity` greater than `1` to indicate a purchase of multiple subscriptions that renew as one, for example, a multi-seat subscription. If subscriptions can have different billing dates or renewal schedules, report them as separate line items with a `quantity` of `1`.

# quantity

**Type**

The quantity of the product the customer purchased in a single transaction.

## Declaration

```swift
int64 quantity
```

## Discussion

The `quantity` field applies only to purchases. Don’t include a `quantity` for refunds.

Set `quantity` to `1` when a customer purchases a single product. Use a value greater than `1` when someone purchases a multiple of the same product in one transaction.



Multiple items may be considered a single product if they are sold as a package. For example, a 10-pack of game gems may be a single product with a quantity of `1`.

If the [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/productType] is `SUBSCRIPTION`, use a `quantity` greater than `1` to indicate a purchase of multiple subscriptions that renew as one, for example, a multi-seat subscription. If subscriptions can have different billing dates or renewal schedules, report them as separate line items with a `quantity` of `1`.

## Providing product info

- **productIdentifier**: A string that identifies the product.
- **productType**: The type of product in the transaction, whether it’s a one-time buy, or a subscription.
